## Description
Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request, including the motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification Checklist
Please confirm that you have performed the following validation steps:
- [ ] The app compiles cleanly without warnings or errors in Release/Debug configuration.
- [ ] All unit tests pass successfully (`⌘U` or `xcodebuild test`).
- [ ] Manual verification has been done (smoke test chat, cowork, code, artifacts views).
- [ ] Strict Concurrency (Swift 6) checks have been satisfied without warnings.
- [ ] Comments and documentation have been updated accordingly.
